hero.title: We Design the
hero.description: Karbon Builder brings your ideas to life with cutting-edge technology and sophisticated design. We will be your best partner for successful digital transformation.

features.title: Why Karbon Builder?
features.subtitle: We think beyond simple development and focus on business growth. Discover the unique strengths that Karbon Builder offers.

speed.title: Fast Performance
speed.description: We provide overwhelming loading speed and performance using the latest technology stack.

security.title: Strong Security
security.description: Protect your valuable data with enterprise-grade security solutions.

responsive.title: Responsive Design
responsive.description: Deliver an optimized user experience that works perfectly on all devices.

services.title: Our Expert Services
services.subtitle: Based on experience in various industries, we propose optimized solutions.

web.title: Web/App Development
web.description: Develop high-performance websites and mobile applications tailored to business requirements.

design.title: UI/UX Design
design.description: Design intuitive and beautiful user-centered interfaces to enhance brand value.

cloud.title: Cloud Solutions
cloud.description: Provide stable and scalable cloud infrastructure construction and management services.

cta.title: Start Your Project with Karbon Builder Today
cta.subtitle: Hesitation only delays innovation. Discover new business possibilities through consultation with experts.

about.title: We Create New Standards
about.description: Since its establishment in 2015, Karbon Builder has built successful business models as a digital partner for numerous companies. We believe that technology can enrich people's lives.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Our mission is to convert complex technology into intuitive solutions that anyone can easily use, helping companies focus on their core values.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: We will become the most trusted partner in the global digital solutions market, leading the way in designing a better future through technological innovation.

values.title: Core Values
values.subtitle: How Karbon Builder works and the promise we make to our customers.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We constantly explore new technologies and apply them to business to drive innovation.

insight.title: Insight
insight.description: We read market trends based on data and experience to propose optimal solutions.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: We prioritize promises to customers and maintain transparent and honest partnerships.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We guarantee the highest quality with a craftsman spirit that doesn't miss even the smallest detail.

history.title: Making Imagination Reality
history.description: Since 2015, Karbon Builder has been writing the history of digital innovation with unstoppable challenges.

events: Selected as a Technology Innovation SME (Inno-Biz)
Relocated and expanded Seoul R&D Center
Won Grand Prize at Korea Web Awards
The Joy of Beginning, First Project Secured

services.title: Integrated Solutions for
services.description: Experience premium services throughout the business process, from planning to design, development, and operation.

list.title: Custom Web Solutions
list.subtitle: Web apps with overwhelming performance
list.description: We build high-performance websites and web applications that process complex business logic optimized for user requirements.

list.title: Strategic UI/UX Design
list.subtitle: Sophisticated design that enhances brand value
list.description: We design strategic user experiences that go beyond simple beauty to achieve business goals.

list.title: Cloud Infrastructure
list.subtitle: Stable and scalable infrastructure operation
list.description: We build the best cloud environment to respond flexibly to traffic changes and provide 24/7 uninterrupted service.

process.title: Collaboration Process
process.description: We increase the success of projects through transparent and efficient communication.

notice.title: Latest News
notice.description: Stay updated with Karbon Builder's latest news and important announcements.

qna.title: Frequently Asked Questions
qna.description: Find quick answers to common questions about our services.
qna.contactDesc: If you can't find your answer, feel free to contact us directly.

list.question: How long does a project typically take?
list.answer: It depends on the scale, but general business sites take 4-8 weeks, while complex platforms take 3+ months. We provide a detailed schedule during consultation.

list.question: Do you provide maintenance services?
list.answer: Yes, we offer maintenance packages for stable operation, including security updates, bug fixes, and regular performance optimization.

list.question: Is custom design possible?
list.answer: Karbon Builder avoids templates and provides 100% custom design tailored to the client's brand identity.

list.question: Do you support multi-language for global services?
list.answer: Yes, we build global services with built-in multi-language engines and optimized UI for each language.
